title: stelis columnaris
intro: Stelis columnaris, also known as the columnar stelis, is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is prized for its unique, columnar shape and fragrant flowers, which are said to possess medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Stelis columnaris can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
